title: Work permit for overnight camp counsellors: Who can apply - Canada.ca
content:
To be eligible, you must meet all the requirements below:
- You meet the general eligibility requirements for a work permit.
- You’ll be working at an overnight summer camp. At an overnight camp, campers and the camp counsellors stay overnight at the camp for more than a weekend.
- At an overnight camp, campers and the camp counsellors stay overnight at the camp for more than a weekend.
- Your main duties will include both of the following: supervising and guiding children in summer camp activities, such as planning and organizing activities guiding and teaching outdoor activities ensuring children’s safety and monitoring their activities supervising children during meals instructing children in daily routines and cleanup tasks leading sports crafts games other recreational activities
- supervising and guiding children in summer camp activities, such as planning and organizing activities guiding and teaching outdoor activities ensuring children’s safety and monitoring their activities supervising children during meals instructing children in daily routines and cleanup tasks
- planning and organizing activities
- guiding and teaching outdoor activities
- ensuring children’s safety and monitoring their activities
- supervising children during meals
- instructing children in daily routines and cleanup tasks
- leading sports crafts games other recreational activities
- other recreational activities
If the duties above aren’t your main duties, you’re not an overnight camp counsellor even if that’s your job title.
